steps.title: Compare claims about expertise
steps.content: Calder claims Appia lacked technical expertise with theater lighting. Text 2 rejects that view, saying he was not an amateur and had apprenticed with a lighting specialist.

steps.title: Reject off-topic responses
steps.content: A mentions technicians dismissing ideas, C mentions admiration, and D shifts to music and sound. Text 2 would point to Appia's apprenticeship as evidence of technical expertise. The answer is B.
